sections.paragraph:
Original: לחשׁ

Transliteration: lâchash

Phonetic: law-khash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to whisper, charm, conjure
    1. (Piel) charmers, conjurers, whisperers (participle)
    2. (Hithpael) to whisper to each other

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1107

Part(s) of speech: Verb
